scripts.build:images: mkdir -p static/pictures/optimized && npx sharp-cli -i static/pictures/sr_dolores_and_emmanuel_sharpen.png -o static/pictures/optimized/sr_dolores_1200w.webp resize 1200 && npx sharp-cli -i static/pictures/sr_dolores_and_emmanuel_sharpen.png -o static/pictures/optimized/sr_dolores_800w.webp resize 800 && npx sharp-cli -i static/pictures/sr_dolores_and_emmanuel_sharpen.png -o static/pictures/optimized/sr_dolores_400w.webp resize 400 && npx sharp-cli -i static/pictures/sr_dolores_and_emmanuel_sharpen.png -o static/pictures/optimized/sr_dolores_1200w.jpg resize 1200 && npx sharp-cli -i static/pictures/sr_dolores_and_emmanuel_sharpen.png -o static/pictures/optimized/sr_dolores_800w.jpg resize 800 && npx sharp-cli -i static/pictures/sr_dolores_and_emmanuel_sharpen.png -o static/pictures/optimized/sr_dolores_400w.jpg resize 400
